refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital room, with a person present in the background. The rodent appears to be roaming freely.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room while I was visiting a patient. The rodent was running around on the floor and it was very disturbing. This is unacceptable in a healthcare setting.
voice_text: There's a rat in the hospital room, it's just walking around on the floor. This is disgusting and something needs to be done about it.
